About Me

A developer who thinks like a designer.

I'm a Flutter Developer and NTI-Certified UI/UX Designer based in Tanta, Egypt. Currently studying Business Information Systems (BIS), I've independently shipped 4 cross-platform Flutter apps in under 7 months.

My strength lies at the intersection of clean code and polished UI — I translate Figma designs into production-ready Flutter apps with attention to every pixel, interaction, and architecture decision.

Strong CS foundation: C++, OOP, Data Structures & Algorithms. Every project I build is open-source on GitHub.

Foojo — Food Delivery App

Cross-platform food delivery app with full auth flow, restaurant browsing, meal ordering, and real-time delivery tracking map. Architected with 3 isolated storage layers for scalability.

FlutterSQLiteSecure StorageSharedPrefsCachedNetworkImage

Notebook — To-Do App

Task management app rebuilt across 2 public iterations — v1 with local setState, v2 upgraded to Firebase Firestore with Google Sign-In OAuth and real-time sync. Adopted by 2 real users.

FlutterFirebaseFirestoreGoogle OAuthProvider
UX-safe confirmation dialogs before destructive actions
Real-time CRUD sync across devices via Firestore
